date_status_values.locked: confirmed against a fetched page (source URL present) or Tony's rituals doc
date_status_values.verify: drafted from model knowledge — NOT decoder-usable until confirmed
date_status_values.harvest: no date yet — agent must fetch

rules: Duration probes only consume date_status=locked entries with a source URL.
All cipher values regenerated through gematria-core — never hand-edited.
Rituals/founders layer is auxiliary narrative; never overrides skip-gate or Live AB Protocol.
Sport scope: MLB draws mlb_teams + shared layers; WNBA draws wnba_teams + shared layers. No cross-sport team tables.

rituals.name: Church of Satan
rituals.note: Founded San Francisco. LaVey=129, died 10/29. 669 attribution unresolved — agent to trace cipher.

rituals.name: Skull and Bones
rituals.note: Order 322 — most-used ritual. Yale=43/16, Skull and Crossbones=223/61. Founded at Yale 10/9. Exact 1832 date: harvest.

rituals.name: Scottish Rite
rituals.note: Satanic=585 locked in regression table. Mother Supreme Council formed Charleston May 1801 (month+year only).

secret_societies.name: Knights Templar
secret_societies.note: Ruling: 1118 (page's explicit founding statement). Some accounts date the Hugues de Payens approach to Baldwin II at 1119.

secret_societies.name: Bohemian Club
secret_societies.note: Ord=105 mirrors Masonry. Formed April 1872 (month+year only).

secret_societies.name: Bohemian Grove
secret_societies.note: CORRECTED from 1872: Grove encampment tradition began 1878 (six years after the Club's 1872 founding).

secret_societies.name: Trilateral Commission
secret_societies.note: CORRECTED from 1973-07-01: page gives July 1973 (month+year only), no day.

secret_societies.name: Ordo Templi Orientis
secret_societies.note: Ruling: anchor 1904 (first verifiable emergence per page: 'nothing verifiable is known of the Order until 1904'); apparent founder Carl Kellner claimed 1895.

institutional.name: Federal Reserve
institutional.note: Ord=143 sits on Wednesday regression lock. Federal Reserve Act enacted 1913-12-23.

institutional.name: Vatican City
institutional.note: Lateran Treaty signed 11 Feb 1929 (took effect 7 June 1929).

institutional.name: United Nations
institutional.note: 165/57 mirrors Scottish Rite. UN came into existence 24 Oct 1945 on Charter ratification.

sports_founders.name: Major League Baseball
sports_founders.note: No single founding date. Infobox lists NL 1876 / AL 1901 / National Agreement 1903 / merged 2000. Anchored to earliest (NL 1876); seed's -02-02 was actually the NL date.

sports_founders.name: National League
sports_founders.note: 137/56 exact mirror of Church of Satan. Founded 2 Feb 1876, New York City.

sports_founders.name: National Basketball Association
sports_founders.note: Founded as BAA 6 June 1946; merged with NBL 1949 to form NBA.

sports_founders.name: WNBA
sports_founders.note: Approved by NBA Board of Governors 24 Apr 1996; first game 21 June 1997.

sports_founders.name: Basketball
sports_founders.note: CORRECTED from 1891-12-21: page gives 'December 1891' (no day). Naismith=141/51=Adam Weishaupt. First official game 20 Jan 1892.

sports_founders.name: Knickerbocker Rules
sports_founders.note: CORRECTED from 1845-09-23: page gives only the year 1845. Baseball codified by Wheaton & Tucker.

tribute_figures.name: Jackie Robinson
tribute_figures.note: #42, Jackie Robinson Day 4/15. DOB confirmed via Wikipedia (Baseball-Reference returned 403).

tribute_figures.name: Lou Gehrig
tribute_figures.note: #4, Lou Gehrig Day 6/2. DOB confirmed via Wikipedia (Baseball-Reference returned 403).

tribute_figures.name: Roberto Clemente
tribute_figures.note: #21, died 12/31/1972. DOB confirmed via Wikipedia (Baseball-Reference returned 403).

tribute_figures.name: Michael Jordan
tribute_figures.note: #23 #45. Ord=113=Kobe Bryant. DOB confirmed via Wikipedia (Basketball-Reference returned 403).

mlb_teams.name: Arizona Diamondbacks
mlb_teams.note: Expansion team, never moved/renamed. Awarded to Phoenix 9 Mar 1995; first season 1998.

mlb_teams.name: Atlanta Braves
mlb_teams.note: Franchise 1871 Boston Red Stockings -> Milwaukee 1953 -> Atlanta 1966 (current identity; year only).

mlb_teams.name: Baltimore Orioles
mlb_teams.note: Franchise 1894 Milwaukee (Western League) -> St. Louis Browns 1902 -> Baltimore Orioles 1954 (current identity; year only).

mlb_teams.name: Boston Red Sox
mlb_teams.note: Never moved. AL charter 1901 as Boston Americans; 'Red Sox' name from 1908.

mlb_teams.name: Chicago Cubs
mlb_teams.note: Never moved. Est. 1870 as Chicago White Stockings; 'Cubs' name officially 1907.

mlb_teams.name: Chicago White Sox
mlb_teams.note: Franchise 1894 Sioux City -> St. Paul Saints -> Chicago 1900; 'White Sox' shortened 1904.

mlb_teams.name: Cincinnati Reds
mlb_teams.note: Never moved. Modern franchise est. 1881 as Red Stockings; Redlegs 1953-58; Reds since 1959.

mlb_teams.name: Cleveland Guardians
mlb_teams.note: Ruling (Tony): anchor to franchise origin from the Date Decoder — Cleveland Blues, AL charter, never relocated, 1901-04-24. Lineage: Blues 1901 -> Naps -> Indians 1915-2021 -> Guardians 2022. (Wikipedia lists franchise origins 1896 Western League / first AL season 1901.) Entry name kept 'Cleveland Guardians' for live-club + gematria match.

mlb_teams.name: Colorado Rockies
mlb_teams.note: Expansion team, never moved/renamed. First season 1993.

mlb_teams.name: Detroit Tigers
mlb_teams.note: Never moved. Founded 1894 (Western League); 'Tigers' AL charter 1901.

mlb_teams.name: Houston Astros
mlb_teams.note: Never moved. NL expansion 1962 as Colt .45s -> Astros 1965 (current-identity name date).

mlb_teams.name: Kansas City Royals
mlb_teams.note: Expansion team, never moved/renamed. Entered AL 1969.

mlb_teams.name: Los Angeles Angels
mlb_teams.note: Expansion 1961 as LA Angels; California/Anaheim/LAA of Anaheim; 'Los Angeles Angels' restored 2016. Original founding 1961 used.

mlb_teams.name: Los Angeles Dodgers
mlb_teams.note: Franchise 1883 Brooklyn -> Los Angeles 1958 (current identity; year only).

mlb_teams.name: Miami Marlins
mlb_teams.note: Expansion 1993 as Florida Marlins (Miami metro throughout) -> Miami Marlins 2012 (current-identity name date).

mlb_teams.name: Milwaukee Brewers
mlb_teams.note: Franchise 1969 Seattle Pilots -> Milwaukee Brewers 1970 (current identity; year only).

mlb_teams.name: Minnesota Twins
mlb_teams.note: Franchise 1901 Washington Senators -> Minnesota Twins 1961 (current identity; year only).

mlb_teams.name: New York Mets
mlb_teams.note: NL expansion team, never moved. First season 1962.

mlb_teams.name: New York Yankees
mlb_teams.note: Ruling: current-identity 1913 (year the 'New York Yankees' name became official). Franchise 1901 Baltimore Orioles -> NY Highlanders 1903 -> Yankees 1913.

mlb_teams.name: Athletics
mlb_teams.note: Franchise 1901 Philadelphia A's -> Kansas City 1955 -> Oakland 1968 -> West Sacramento 2025 (current identity; Las Vegas move planned 2028).

mlb_teams.name: Philadelphia Phillies
mlb_teams.note: Never moved. NL franchise, first season 1883.

mlb_teams.name: Pittsburgh Pirates
mlb_teams.note: Never moved. AA club first played 1882; joined NL 1887; 'Pirates' name 1891.

mlb_teams.name: San Diego Padres
mlb_teams.note: NL expansion team, never moved. First season 1969.

mlb_teams.name: San Francisco Giants
mlb_teams.note: Franchise 1883 New York Gothams/Giants -> San Francisco 1958 (current identity; year only).

mlb_teams.name: Seattle Mariners
mlb_teams.note: AL expansion team, never moved. First season 1977.

mlb_teams.name: St Louis Cardinals
mlb_teams.note: Never moved. Franchise first season 1882 (originally American Association).

mlb_teams.name: Tampa Bay Rays
mlb_teams.note: AL expansion, never moved. 1998 as Tampa Bay Devil Rays -> Rays 2008.

mlb_teams.name: Texas Rangers
mlb_teams.note: Franchise 1961 (2nd) Washington Senators -> Arlington/Texas Rangers 1972 (current identity; year only).

mlb_teams.name: Toronto Blue Jays
mlb_teams.note: AL expansion team, never moved. First season 1977.

mlb_teams.name: Washington Nationals
mlb_teams.note: Franchise 1969 Montreal Expos -> Washington Nationals 2005 (move announced 29 Sep 2004; year only).

wnba_teams.name: Atlanta Dream
wnba_teams.note: Expansion team, never moved. Founded for 2008 season; 'Dream' announced 23 Jan 2008.

wnba_teams.name: Chicago Sky
wnba_teams.note: Expansion team, never moved. Awarded Feb 2005; began play 2006.

wnba_teams.name: Connecticut Sun
wnba_teams.note: Franchise 1999 Orlando Miracle -> Connecticut Sun 2003 (relocation/rename announced 28 Jan 2003; current identity).

wnba_teams.name: Dallas Wings
wnba_teams.note: Franchise 1998 Detroit Shock -> Tulsa Shock 2010 -> Dallas Wings 2016 (current identity; first game 14 May 2016).

wnba_teams.name: Golden State Valkyries
wnba_teams.note: New expansion team, never moved. Awarded 5 Oct 2023; WNBA debut 16 May 2025 (first season).

wnba_teams.name: Indiana Fever
wnba_teams.note: Expansion team, never moved. Founded for 2000 season.

wnba_teams.name: Las Vegas Aces
wnba_teams.note: Franchise 1997 Utah Starzz -> San Antonio Silver Stars/Stars 2003 -> Las Vegas Aces 2018 (current identity).

wnba_teams.name: Los Angeles Sparks
wnba_teams.note: One of eight original WNBA franchises, never moved. First season 1997.

wnba_teams.name: Minnesota Lynx
wnba_teams.note: Expansion team, never moved. Named 5 Dec 1998; began play 1999.

wnba_teams.name: New York Liberty
wnba_teams.note: One of eight original WNBA franchises, never moved. First season 1997.

wnba_teams.name: Phoenix Mercury
wnba_teams.note: One of eight original WNBA franchises, never moved. First season 1997.

wnba_teams.name: Portland Fire
wnba_teams.note: Ruling: 2026 (new-expansion first season; infobox award date 2024-09-18). Distinct from the folded original Portland Fire (2000-2002).

wnba_teams.name: Seattle Storm
wnba_teams.note: Expansion team, never moved. First season 2000.

wnba_teams.name: Toronto Tempo
wnba_teams.note: New expansion team, never moved. Announced 23 May 2024; begins play May 2026. First WNBA team outside the US.

wnba_teams.name: Washington Mystics
wnba_teams.note: Expansion team, never moved. Made official Nov 1997; began play 1998.

states.name: District of Columbia
states.note: FLAG: Residence Act (signed 16 Jul 1790, authorized the federal capital district). Alternate anchor 1800-11-17, when Congress first convened there. Not a US state (no admission #). Home 'state' for Nationals + Mystics.

states.name: Ontario
states.note: Canadian Confederation (British North America Act, 1 Jul 1867). Canadian province, not a US state. Home province for Blue Jays + Tempo.
